overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world western game showing a cowboy character traversing a misty grassland hillside. The weather transitions from overcast to light rain as the character walks along a ridge overlooking a vast valley with distant rock formations.

events.description: character emerges from under tree branches into open hillside

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass emerging from under tree cover onto the open hillside

entered.detail: dense green leaves and branches providing partial cover overhead
thick tree trunk with rough bark texture
tall green grass covering the sloping terrain
misty valley visible in the far distance with low visibility

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character walking under a dense tree canopy with leaves framing the view. As the character moves forward, they emerge into an open grassy hillside with scattered pine trees visible in the misty distance. The atmosphere is humid and overcast.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy ridge with scattered pines

events.description: light rain begins to fall over the hillside, visible as streaks in the air

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy ridge as rain begins to fall

entered.detail: thin wooden posts marking a boundary line in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an open grassy ridge with full sky visibility and scattered pine trees on the left. Wooden fence posts appear in the far distance. Around the 18-second mark, light rain begins to fall, creating a misty atmosphere over the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy hillside ridge with large pine tree

events.description: character approaches and passes a large pine tree standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through rain-soaked grass passing a large pine tree on the right

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree with dense foliage standing prominently on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Walking through steady rainfall, the character approaches a large pine tree on the right side of the ridge. The wooden fence posts seen earlier are now closer on the left. The terrain remains grassy and open with reduced visibility due to the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending hillside with expansive valley overlook

events.description: view opens up to reveal wide valley with distant rock butte formations on the left

agents.ego_description: descending the grassy hillside while overlooking the vast valley below

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation rising prominently from the valley floor
wide green valley stretching into the misty distance with rolling terrain

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large pine tree, the character descends slightly along the ridge as the view opens up to reveal an expansive valley below. A distinctive rock butte formation becomes visible on the left horizon. The rain continues to fall steadily over the wide-open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered forest canopy into a wide, rain-swept valley landscape. It begins with the character walking beneath a dense canopy of leaves before emerging onto a humid, overcast grassy hillside dotted with distant pine trees. As the character traverses the open ridge, the gray sky breaks into a light rain that gradually thickens into a steady downpour, blurring the horizon and shrouding the scattered pines and distant wooden fence posts in mist. The camera then follows the character past a large pine tree and closer to the fence line, maintaining a steady pace through the rainfall. Finally, the terrain descends slightly, opening the view to reveal an expansive valley and a distinctive rock butte formation on the horizon under the persistent rain.
